calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Casey Kaufman, Esq. Kaufman Law 510-900-4426 for Petitioner.
Thomas Murray, Esq. 562-451-6200 Kern Segal & Murray for Respondent.

Argued. Mr. Murray contests the tentative ruling. Mr. Kaufman responds. After full arguments,
the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER KATHERINE DERRAH's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)GRANTING

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Continued To Dec-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PETITIONER KATHERINE DERRAH'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Continued to December 12, 2024, to allow for consideration of opposing party's belated courtesy copies. SF Local Rule 2.7B(1).

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: C. Loke. (301/RCE)
